Urban Terror Optimized — what's in this archive

Single game client with dynamically loaded renderers (Vulkan + OpenGL).

  urbanterror-optimized(.x64/.exe)   Game client. Starts with the Vulkan renderer
                                     by default (recommended). If Vulkan fails to
                                     start on your system, switch to OpenGL from the
                                     in-game console:
                                         \cl_renderer opengl
                                         \vid_restart

  urbanterror-optimized.ded(...)     Dedicated server (no renderer).

  *_vulkan_*  (.so / .dll / .dylib)  Vulkan renderer module (loaded by the client).
  *_opengl_*  (.so / .dll / .dylib)  OpenGL renderer module (fallback).

Copy these into your Urban Terror installation (game data lives in q3ut4/).
